scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.docker:up: docker compose up -d postgres mongodb backend frontend
scripts.docker:update: docker compose pull backend frontend && docker compose up -d --force-recreate backend frontend
scripts.docker:build:local: docker build -t esteban003/repiensa-backend:latest ./backend && docker build -t esteban003/repiensa-frontend:latest ./frontend && docker compose up -d --force-recreate backend frontend
scripts.docker:seed: docker compose exec backend npm run db:seed
scripts.docker:reset: docker compose exec -e PRISMA_USER_CONSENT_FOR_DANGEROUS_AI_ACTION=yes backend npm run db:reset
scripts.test:load:smoke: docker compose --profile load run --rm --no-deps k6 run /scripts/smoke.js
scripts.test:load: docker compose --profile load run --rm --no-deps k6 run /scripts/api-load.js
scripts.test:load:stress: docker compose --profile load run --rm --no-deps k6 run /scripts/api-load-stress.js
scripts.sonar:reset: docker compose --profile sonar down && docker volume rm repiensa-tech_sonarqube_data && docker compose --profile sonar up -d sonarqube
scripts.sonar:coverage: npm run test:coverage --prefix backend && node backend/scripts/fix-lcov-for-sonar.js
scripts.sonar: npm run sonar:coverage && npm run sonar:scan
